How was today?

today
   Good  Great! Average 
     10       9       3

What was good about today’s lesson?

answer
Most of all speakers were clear and big voice, then that was easy to understand.
I can learn a lot of world problem.
I was able to learn about global issues I hadn’t known about before
All of the contents that presented today sounds interesting.
learn about differnt topics
I’m glad there was someone with such a captivating story.
I finished my presentation!
I was able to listen to the presentation carefully.
The content which related to forest was good.
I was able to listen intently to everyone’s presentation.
Because listening to everyone’s presentations increased my knowledge and perspectives.
I learn various issue around the world.
It was that I was able to know what presenters do as their research.
It was good to listen the presentations of 7 members.
I could learn about various problem.
It was a wonderful presentation for everyone.
I did my best.
I could my presentation as I practiced.
My presentation went mostly good. I liked other’s presentation contents.
I could learn interesting contents
I could know new topic of lookism.
Next week, I have a presentation, so I can use this to improve my own presentation.

What was not so good?

answer
Their voice tone was same.
I cannot understand all content.
nothing
I was a presenter today, and I aometimes forgot my scripts.
did not talk in English at all
There were even people who just read from a script
I was nervous about my presentation so I do not my best.
I could barely speak English.
The pace between presentations was too fast for me.
Nothing.
Because there were parts I couldn’t understand.
I feel my presentation was not fluency.
I was not able to understand all of their contents of speaking.
I could not give 3 members nice advice.
I couldn’t understand their English perfectly.
my presentation is not good,
I couldn’t speak fluency.
Nothing else.
I wasn’t able to say everything I wanted to say.
I cloud not speak with my partner
I could not keep up the speed of some presentation.
Nothing in particular.

Whose presentation did you like best?

gold
   Uchida Yurara       Ura Himari       Oyama Nene Akutagawa Ririka 
              10                6                3                3
gold reason
Akutagawa Ririka Because she speaked her own words.
Akutagawa Ririka She could make eye contact.
Akutagawa Ririka She was talking without a script and talking to everyone.
Oyama Nene Good content, and she didn’t read the script so much.
Oyama Nene Her voice was clear and very easy to listen to.
Oyama Nene good slides and clear voice.
Uchida Yurara Because it was the easiest to understand.
Uchida Yurara Her attitude and speech was very good.
Uchida Yurara Her powerrpoint was easy to understand, and she did eye contact well.
Uchida Yurara Her presentation was wonderful because her attitude and skills of speaking were so good.
Uchida Yurara It was easy to understand and good slides.
Uchida Yurara She speaks fluent English and content is interesting.
Uchida Yurara The content is interesting
Uchida Yurara The content was interesting, and their attitude was great.
Uchida Yurara because the fluency and the slide were nice
Uchida Yurara she was particular about the presentation, and i was told that she was preparing well
Ura Himari Her English was good and fluently. Also she made beautiful slides.
Ura Himari Her presentation was very good to understand and her voice was easy to hear.
Ura Himari Her voice is very clearly.
Ura Himari The English was easy to understand, the slides were clear—everything was perfect!
Ura Himari The content was good
Ura Himari great content, clear voice, and good fluency
